title: Initial setup
summary: Initialized Rust project with TUI dependencies, linting tools, test framework, and CI pipeline
details: Created single-crate Rust project (ralph-tui) with binary and lib structure
Configured ratatui 0.29, crossterm 0.28, tokio 1.x, serde 1.x dependencies
Set up rustfmt, clippy with strict linting (unsafe_code=forbid, all warnings)
Configured cargo-deny v2 for dependency auditing with license and security checks
Implemented unit and integration test framework with passing tests
Created GitHub Actions CI pipeline with build, test, lint, and security checks
All verifications passing: build, test, fmt, clippy, cargo-deny
